institutionName: North Carolina Agricultural and Technical State University
collegeName: College of Agriculture and Environmental Sciences (CAES)
programName: Bachelor of Science in Agricultural & Environmental Systems — Environmental Studies
tagline: Protect the Planet — Science, Policy & Action
programDescription: The Environmental Studies concentration examines the interactions between human societies and the natural environment through an interdisciplinary lens. Students study environmental policy, ecology, GIS, and sustainability to prepare for careers in environmental management, conservation, regulatory compliance, and sustainability consulting. Field experiences at the SFRIC and local ecosystems provide hands-on learning.

careerOutlook.outlook: Environmental scientists are essential for climate adaptation, environmental justice, and regulatory compliance. Growing emphasis on environmental equity creates unique opportunities for HBCU graduates who understand underserved community needs.
